title: TAQA Morocco and Moeve Sign Land Deal for Green Hydrogen Project
content: TAQA Morocco and Moeve (formerly Cepsa) have signed a preliminary land reservation agreement with the Moroccan government to develop a large-scale green hydrogen, green ammonia, and industrial e-fuel project. Selected as part of Morocco's "Green Hydrogen Offer," the consortium divides responsibilities: TAQA Morocco will lead renewable energy generation at a site in the Dakhla region, while Moeve will manage the production and marketing of e-fuels from a facility at the Port of Jorf Lasfar. This agreement marks a critical milestone, enabling the official launch of feasibility studies. The project aims to accelerate the decarbonization of heavy industry and transport by establishing a supply chain for hydrogen-derived fuels.
author: Analysts Account
